zh.Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire: 英國賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot於1331年8月27日出生在英國賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素時，他的父親Richard de Talbot30歲，母親Elizabeth de Comyn31歲。他與Pernel Butler結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年4月24日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德洛阿萊斯 德 甘波斯洛阿萊斯享年55歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot was born on 27 August 1331, in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, his father, Richard de Talbot, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth de Comyn, was 31. He married Pernel Butler. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 April 1387, in Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 55, and was buried in Castile, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot est né le 27 août 1331, à Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Talbot, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Comyn, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Pernel Butler. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1387, à Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Castile, Espagne.

de.Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Ca: Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot am 27. August 1331 in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Talbot 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Comyn 31. Er hat Pernel Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. April 1387 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Castile, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot è nato il il 27 agosto 1331 nel Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Talbot, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Comyn, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Pernel Butler. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 aprile 1387, nel Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Castile, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbotが1331年8月27日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアグドリチグドリチ カストルで生まれた時，父Richard de Talbotは30歳，母Elizabeth de Comynは31歳であった。Pernel Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年4月24日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドロアレス ド カンプオスロアレスで55歳で死去し，スペインカスティルにて埋葬された。

ko.Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Ca: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 로일스 데 캄푸스 로일스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot(이)가 1331년 8월 27일 영국 허퍼드실르 구드리치 구드리치 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Talbot(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Comyn(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Pernel Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 4월 24일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 로일스 데 캄푸스 로일스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸에 묻혔다.

pt.Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Ca: Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1331, em Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Talbot, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Comyn, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Pernel Butler. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1387, em Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Castile, Espanha.

ru.Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Ca: роеилесь, роеилесь де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot родился 27 августа 1331 г. в местности гудрич кастл, гудрич, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Talbot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Comyn, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Pernel Butler. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 апреля 1387 г. в местности роеилесь, роеилесь де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности кастиль, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert Talbot 3rd Lord Talbot nació el 27 de agosto de 1331, en Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Talbot, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Comyn, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Pernel Butler. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de abril de 1387, en Roales, Roales de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Castile, España.
